title: Wire the grill family into PROCESS.md and CONTEXT.md; sweep every stale reference and repoint format-doc links
description: PROCESS.md's grill node expands to context-grill (when the shared model shifts) then epic-grill (requirements plus optional design) then PRD then issues, and states the disk handoff: epic-grill reads CONTEXT.md by path and context-grill's term writes land before epic-grill begins. CONTEXT.md's Setup-Grill/Work-Grill glossary entry and flagged ambiguities update for the grill family, and its 'Format authority' pointer repoints to the settled format-doc home. A repo-wide reference sweep lands in this same change so zero stale references remain — per the PROCESS.md contract-sweep rule that EXEC-083 violated when AC-1 and AC-3 contradicted. Src-First then root mirror.
acceptance_criteria: PROCESS.md grill node expands to context-grill then epic-grill then PRD then issues, and states the disk handoff (epic-grill reads committed CONTEXT.md before it begins).
CONTEXT.md Setup/Work Grill entry and flagged ambiguities describe the grill family; the 'Format authority' line repoints to the settled CONTEXT-FORMAT.md / ADR-FORMAT.md home and resolves.

A repo-wide sweep for the old skill name and the format-doc paths (across *.md, hooks, settings, README, AGENTS.md, root CLAUDE.md pointer block) leaves zero stale references in src/template and the root Instance; the sweep result is recorded.
Every relative and absolute link to CONTEXT-FORMAT.md and ADR-FORMAT.md resolves after the move.
alignment PASS on the persistent-doc changes (PROCESS.md, CONTEXT.md); Src-First mirror to root.
notes: Filed from the PRD-010 breakdown 2026-06-14. Repo-wide stale-name sweep (Gap 4, P1), format-doc link repoint (Gap 5), and disk-handoff statement (Gap 8) added from the adversarial gap-hunt; the stale-name failure is exactly the sprint-7 EXEC-083 contradiction.
